Cardano Founder Excluded from White House Crypto Summit Despite ADA Inclusion in Proposed Reserve
data.description:
Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has revealed that he was not invited to the upcoming White House Crypto Summit scheduled for March 7. This exclusion has sparked discussions, particularly because the blockchain network’s ADA token is included in the proposed crypto reserve by the US President.

In a March 6 broadcast, Hoskinson stated that he had not received an invitation to the event. He downplayed the significance of the summit, suggesting that it might not involve meaningful policy discussions. Hoskinson argued that real policy work happens within the legislative branch, where he has collaborated with lawmakers over the years. He reaffirmed his commitment to pushing for regulatory clarity through legislative engagement, particularly on key bills related to stablecoins and market structure.

Despite his absence, several key figures in the crypto industry have confirmed their attendance. Among them are Michael Saylor, Chairman of Strategy—the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin—along with Brian Armstrong of coinbase, Arjun Sethi of Kraken, and Vlad Tenev of Robinhood.

Hoskinson’s exclusion is particularly striking given that ADA has been listed as part of the proposed crypto reserve. The president recently announced plans to create a reserve featuring Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Solana, and Cardano. He is expected to outline his strategy for this initiative at the event. The Cardano founder admitted that he was unaware of ADA’s inclusion until the news broke. According to him, he woke up on Sunday and found over one hundred fifty messages congratulating him on the news, but he had no prior knowledge of the development.

data.title: AI Agents to Dominate Next Decade as Web3 and AI Converge
data.description:
Binance's CEO, Changpeng Zhao, commonly known as cz, has made a significant prediction about the future of AI agents. He believes that AI agents are likely to become a major trend in the next decade. This prediction comes as AI and web3 technologies are increasingly recognized as the driving forces behind the next phase of technological growth. The fusion of AI and web3 has been a hot topic at recent conferences, where discussions about AI x web3 were ubiquitous.

Several projects and platforms are actively developing AI agent launch platforms and frameworks. For instance, 0G Labs is building a decentralized artificial intelligence operating system (deAIOS) that connects computing resources, data, and models to construct a distributed AI development ecosystem. DeAgentAI is another platform focused on decentralized AI agents, promoting the development of multi-agent technology. Autonomy Network aims to achieve secure and autonomous human-machine collaboration, allowing users to create AI agents that can act autonomously in various scenarios.

Gaia Network supports the distributed development and deployment of AI agents and applications, integrating distributed storage, computing, and data verification through blockchain technology. Questflow is a decentralized network of multiple AI agents that can autonomously complete tasks, leveraging the collective intelligence and capabilities of these agents to achieve efficiency and speed. These projects are part of a broader trend towards decentralized AI, which aims to break the monopoly of large companies on large language models (LLMs) and help the public gain ownership of data and models.

Vana is committed to building a decentralized user data sovereignty platform. It allows users to contribute and verify data through the blockchain, generating tokenized assets for AI model training while ensuring data security and quality. Hyperbolic is an open-access AI cloud platform that integrates global computing resources to provide cost-effective, scalable GPU resources and AI services. OpenLedger provides decentralized economic infrastructure to support developers in acquiring high-quality data, fine-tuning specialized language models, and deploying them as paid services.

IO.NET offers on-demand access to GPU and CPU clusters, eliminating the need for users to have expensive hardware or infrastructure. aethir provides distributed cloud computing infrastructure, with Aethir Earth designed for AI computing tasks and Aethir Atmosphere optimized for the gaming industry. MinionLab is a decentralized autonomous AI agent network where these agents, called Minions, can perform various tasks autonomously, enhancing efficiency and productivity.

data.title: ZacroTribe Challenges Solana with AI Analytics and Decentralized News Platform
data.description:
ZacroTribe (ZACRO) is emerging as a significant competitor in the cryptocurrency market, positioning itself as a strong rival to Solana (SOL). Currently priced at $0.01, ZacroTribe is gaining traction with its decentralized news platform, AI-powered analytics, and community-driven governance. Analysts predict that as adoption increases and demand rises, ZACRO could experience exponential growth, potentially reaching $10.

Solana has been strengthening its market position by providing quick transactions and developing its decentralized finance (DeFi) ecosystem. Institutional investors, along with non-fungible token (NFT) projects and decentralized applications, choose Solana because it offers fast transactions at low fees. The upward movement in the price of SOL is accompanied by traders who watch resistance levels due to increasing long-term market confidence.

The ZacroTribe presale is currently live, offering early investors the chance to secure ZACRO tokens at just $0.01 before the price increases to $0.02 in the next stage. With 49,500,000 tokens available, buyers can purchase ZACRO at the lowest price before the price surges.

ZacroTribe implements decentralized reporting methods alongside AI analytics tools to enable community-led governance in the financial field. The platform collects the latest news updates from both approved journalists and anonymous contributors to maintain unbiased reporting speed. The platform uses AI analytics to supply market pattern insights, deal signals, and sentiment evaluation measures, which support information-driven decision procedures for users.

ZacroTribe enhances investment opportunities through presale aggregators, which show promising projects to investors. Through its governance structure, ZacroTribe enables its token owners to become involved in vital decision-making steps, reinforcing the decentralized structure of the platform. The ZacroTribe platform utilizes the secure BNB blockchain to benefit from smart contracts with an established developer environment that improves operational transparency. The project is developing a plan to connect ZacroTribe with XDC, Solana, Ethereum, and Avalanche networks to establish a scalable cross-chain system.

ZacroTribe is expanding its ecosystem by introducing advanced AI-powered analytics tools, including trading signals, sentiment analysis, and backtesting. A mobile app for iOS and Android is being developed to enhance accessibility. The platform will also feature an Airdrop and Presale Aggregator

data.title: Trump's Tit-for-Tat Tariffs Could Inflict Further Pain on Stocks: The Incoming Storm and Our Strategy
data.description:
The S&P 500 has nearly erased its gains since November 5th, when Donald Trump secured a sweeping victory in the U.S. presidential election. Endless tariff threats and a focus on MAGA over economic fundamentals have raised investor concerns. Although current valuations appear reasonable amid ongoing AI advancements, the escalation of the tit-for-tat trade war, a slowing economy, and Trump's tendency to blame the previous administration could further depress market beta. Friday's nonfarm payrolls may serve as the next catalyst for market disruption, prompting investors to prepare for additional downside risks.

Global Trade War Intensifies

Many had anticipated that a Trump 2.0 administration would boost stocks through deregulation and margin expansion. However, the President has increasingly acted as a capricious politician rather than a seasoned businessman. Tariffs have become his primary tool to force concessions from trading partners, compelling companies to invest billions in the U.S. without clear benefits. As Psychology 101 reminds us, while punishment may curb unwanted behavior in the short term, it can hinder long-term growth and produce negative side effects.

The tit-for-tat has already begun. The Trump administration doubled tariffs on Chinese goods to 20% and imposed 25% tariffs on imports from Mexico and Canada starting Tuesday. In response, China immediately announced additional tariffs of 10–15% on U.S. agricultural goods, while Canada is considering a 25% tariff on over $100 billion of U.S. goods next month, and Mexico is evaluating countermeasures. Although Canada and Mexico have previously compromised under U.S. pressure, this time they appear poised to adopt a stronger retaliatory stance as real tariffs take effect.

This is only phase one. Trump's 25% tariff on steel and aluminum imports is set to take effect on March 12, with further tariffs on the EU and additional measures on China anticipated, and reciprocal actions scheduled for April 2. With more countries likely to join the tit-for-tat, the market could face significant volatility in the near future. Trump has signaled that he will escalate tariffs in response to further retaliation, potentially creating a highly unstable trade environment.

The current scenario is markedly different from 2016–2020, when Trump's tariff actions primarily targeted China. In 2024, the U.S. posted a trade deficit of $1.2 trillion, with Mexico, Canada, and China ranking as its top three trading partners. The resulting retaliatory measures could have far more severe consequences than previously imagined.

Economic Slowdown and Blame Biden

Global trade tensions may ignite inflationary pressures, further weaken the economy, and force the Fed to implement rate cuts to stave off recession risks. U.S. consumer confidence is plummeting its steepest decline in four years, while January's core PCE of 2.6% remains above the Fed's 2% target. With tariffs on Chinese goods already in effect in February and more scheduled for March, market participants are closely watching upcoming inflation data, while Friday's nonfarm payroll report becomes even more critical.

Disappointing job creation figures have added to concerns. According to ADP, private sector employment increased by only 77,000 in February, well below the 148,000 consensus, marking the smallest increase since July. Some economists now project that Friday's report could show a gain of merely 170,000 jobs, with the unemployment rate holding at 4%, signaling substantial downside risks. 

Recalling the nonfarm payroll report from last July (+114K), which came in well below the estimate (+185K), the S&P 500 tumbled 1.84% that Friday and fell another 3% on Monday. If this month's nonfarm payroll report presents a similar scenario, stocks could face even more trouble amid tariff headwinds and the Fed's cautious stance.

Importantly, Trump is likely to deflect blame for any economic downturn onto Biden. In previous addresses, he claimed the economy inherited an economic catastrophe and an inflation nightmare from the previous administration, a rhetoric echoed by Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, who faulted Biden for recent economic declines and stock market drops.

Even if some stocks have attractive fundamentals and reasonable valuations, the deteriorating macroeconomic backdrop could further depress valuations. Recent volatility driven by Trump's unpredictable policy moves suggests that market trends can reverse abruptly. 

Investors are advised to hedge against further downside risks—potentially by purchasing spx put options, maintaining cash reserves, or investing in defensive stocks. The current rotation into safe-haven stocks such as walmart, Costco, and coke indicates a shift in investor sentiment, but caution is warranted as further adverse policies may materialize.

data.title: Tesla's German Sales Plummet 76%, And Analysts Are Blaming Musk's Political Stance For It
data.description:
Tesla, whose stock price has been declining recently, has encountered more bad news. The company's sales in the German market last month plummeted by more than three-quarters, which may be related to its CEO Elon Musk's frequent comments on European politics.

Data released by the German Federal Motor Transport Authority on Tuesday showed that Tesla's sales in February plummeted by 76%, with only 1,429 new cars sold. In contrast, the overall electric vehicle market in Germany performed strongly, with registrations increasing by 30.8% year-on-year to 35,949 vehicles in the same month.

After the U.S. presidential election, Tesla's stock price surged to a record high, as Musk made significant contributions to Trump's victory, thereby earning his trust.

However, since the beginning of this year, Tesla's stock price has fallen by about one-third.

In the first two months of this year, Tesla's sales in Germany and France fell by 71% and 44%, respectively. These two countries are the largest electric vehicle markets in the European Union.

In contrast, Tesla's performance in the UK market has been relatively strong. The UK replaced Germany as Europe's largest electric vehicle market last year, and Tesla's registrations in the UK increased by 11% in the first two months of this year, mainly due to strong growth in February.

However, Tesla's overall performance in the European market is not optimistic. Data released last week showed that Tesla's sales in Europe in January this year fell sharply, down 45% compared to the same period last year.

Part of the reason behind Tesla's sales decline may be related to Musk's repeated involvement in European politics. Since December last year, Musk has frequently publicly supported far-right forces in Europe on the social media platform X, such as the German Alternative for Germany (AfD) party, which has sparked local resentment and even led to protests and sporadic acts of sabotage.

In addition to Musk's political remarks, Tesla's weak performance at the beginning of the year has also been affected by other factors.

Tesla is suspending production at some factories to adjust the production line for the Model Y. The Model Y is Tesla's best-selling model, but the production adjustment will lead to a short-term decline in output. The model has undergone its first facelift since its launch five years ago, and it will take time to resume production.

Furthermore, tesla is facing challenges from local competitors and Chinese automakers. At the beginning of this year, BYD surpassed Tesla in sales in several European markets.

data.title: Vietnam Prepares for Crypto Trading Pilot Amid Global Trend
data.description:
Vietnam is set to launch a pilot program for cryptocurrency trading as the legal framework for digital assets nears approval. This initiative marks a significant step toward integrating digital assets into the country’s financial system. Deputy Minister of Finance Nguyen Duc Chi confirmed that the government is aware of the global trend towards crypto regulation and aims to leverage it for economic development.

The Ministry of Finance, in collaboration with the State Bank of Vietnam, has been tasked with drafting new regulations under the directive of Prime Minister Pham Minh Chinh. The upcoming crypto and digital asset trading platform will be state-regulated, ensuring that investor rights are protected. Additionally, the government is exploring new regulations to allow Vietnamese companies to issue virtual assets as a means of raising capital, aligning local businesses with global trends in digital asset ownership.

Despite the increasing popularity of cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin and Ethereum, Vietnam has yet to establish a clear legal definition for virtual currencies and digital assets. Existing regulations only cover electronic money tied to fiat currency, such as prepaid bank cards and e-wallets. The absence of a structured legal framework has driven many Vietnamese crypto businesses to register in other countries, leading to competitive disadvantages and lost tax revenues for Vietnam.

To address this, Party General Secretary To Lam recently called for the development of a sandbox to facilitate digital asset trading. Vietnam ranks among the top countries globally in crypto adoption. In 2021 and 2022, the country had a 21% digital asset ownership rate, trailing only the United Arab Emirates and the U.S. Furthermore, according to a 2024 blockchain report, Vietnam ranked fifth in the world in crypto adoption and third by crypto value received in the Asia Pacific, seeing an inflow of $120 billion in digital assets.

Vietnamese authorities have faced challenges in addressing the rising tide of crypto-related fraud. In December, the Hanoi City Police Department prevented 300 potential victims from falling prey to an elaborate crypto scam that had already defrauded 30 billion Vietnamese dong from approximately 100 businesses and 400 individuals. The case followed a series of high-profile arrests, including the October 2024 discovery of an elaborate crypto fraud and cybercrime network in Southeast Asia.

data.title: Solana Co-Founder Warns US National Crypto Reserve Threatens Decentralization
data.description:
Solana co-founder Anatoly Yakovenko has expressed significant concerns about the potential establishment of a US national crypto reserve, highlighting the risks it poses to the decentralization of cryptocurrencies. Yakovenko's remarks come at a time when discussions about the US government's role in the cryptocurrency space are intensifying. He advocates for minimal government control to preserve the integrity and decentralized nature of blockchain networks.

Yakovenko's concerns were articulated in a series of social media posts, where he emphasized that a national crypto reserve could undermine the core principles of decentralization. He believes that government control could stifle innovation and restrict the freedom that cryptocurrencies offer to their users. His comments were particularly relevant following an announcement regarding the inclusion of several digital assets in a proposed crypto strategic reserve. Yakovenko warned that governmental oversight could compromise the integrity and efficacy of blockchain technology, urging that decentralization should be protected from such interventions.

In his ideal scenario, Yakovenko prefers that there be no national crypto reserve at all. However, if reserves were to be established, he suggests that individual states should have the autonomy to manage their own reserves. This approach would allow regions to tailor their strategies to local needs and mitigate the negative impacts of central authority errors. Yakovenko also proposed that if a national reserve is necessary, the selection criteria for cryptocurrencies should be based on objectively measurable standards to ensure transparency and trust in the evaluation process. He expressed confidence in Solana's ability to meet such standards, highlighting the ecosystem's capacity for growth under constructive guidelines.

The conversation sparked by Yakovenko's comments has resonated throughout the crypto community, with other industry leaders echoing similar sentiments. For instance, Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano, denied any prior knowledge of Cardano's potential inclusion in the reserve, emphasizing a collective lack of engagement with the administration regarding such inclusions. This situation reflects a broader skepticism within the crypto community towards government involvement in cryptocurrency, as many leaders are concerned about the implications of state control on the independent nature of digital assets.

The discussions surrounding the creation of a national crypto reserve involve significant considerations about the future of regulatory practices in the industry. As crypto assets gain more traction in global economies, the balance between fostering innovation and ensuring security remains a point of contention. Regulatory clarity, as proposed by Yakovenko, could pave the way for a more robust digital economy while ensuring that the

data.title: Litecoin Price Predictions Soar to $528 by 2030
data.description:
Litecoin, a prominent cryptocurrency, has been a subject of interest for investors and analysts alike, with predictions for its price trajectory extending to 2030. As of the latest data, the price of Litecoin stands at approximately $108.60. The cryptocurrency market has faced numerous challenges, including political complications and economic policies, which have influenced the performance of top tokens, including Litecoin.

Investors are particularly interested in whether Litecoin will reach $200 by the end of 2025. This question has sparked a range of predictions and analyses, with some experts suggesting that Litecoin could potentially hit $200 this year. The price of Litecoin is influenced by several factors, including Bitcoin's price movements, adoption for payments, and regulatory clarity. If major financial institutions collaborate with Litecoin, the price could surge to $200 in 2025. However, if the market crashes, the price could drop to $130, with the average price expected to be around $165.

Looking ahead, the potential low price for Litecoin in 2026 is projected to be $207, with an average price of $234 and a high price of $260. In 2027, the potential low price is forecasted to be $232, with an average price of $283 and a high price of $334. By 2028, the potential low price is expected to be $280, with an average price of $330 and a high price of $380. In 2029, the potential low price is anticipated to be $379, with an average price of $412 and a high price of $444. Finally, in 2030, the potential low price is projected to be $402, with an average price of $465 and a high price of $528.

data.title: Samsara Inc. (IOT) Enhances Fleet Safety and Efficiency for FM Conway with AI-Powered Solutions
data.description:
Samsara Inc. (IOT), a pioneer in the Connected Operations Platform, has significantly enhanced fleet safety and efficiency for FM Conway, a leading UK infrastructure services company. By implementing Samsara's advanced AI and fleet management solutions, FM Conway has achieved remarkable improvements in safety metrics and cost savings. This case study highlights the transformative impact of Samsara's technology on FM Conway's operations, providing a compelling example of how AI-powered solutions can drive operational excellence in the transportation sector.

FM Conway manages a fleet of over 1,000 vehicles, driving approximately 16 million miles annually. The implementation of Samsara's Connected Operations Platform has led to a 21.9% reduction in road traffic accidents between November 2022 and November 2023. Additionally, light speeding incidents decreased from 2.7% to 0.6%, and moderate speeding reduced from 1% to 0.2% between March 2023 and March 2024. These improvements in driver behavior have not only enhanced safety but also resulted in significant cost savings. FM Conway achieved total savings of £212,000, including £155,000 on third-party insurance claims.

The success of Samsara's implementation at FM Conway can be attributed to its comprehensive approach to fleet management. The platform integrates AI dash cams and Vehicle Gateways to provide real-time monitoring of driver behavior and vehicle diagnostics. This real-time data collection enables immediate response to potential safety issues, ensuring proactive maintenance and reducing the likelihood of accidents. The dual-facing AI dash cams, for instance, provide immediate driver feedback while simultaneously feeding data to fleet managers, creating a closed-loop system for behavior modification. This proactive approach has resulted in a 56.1% reduction in outstanding vehicle defects from May 2022 to January 2024, further enhancing the overall safety and efficiency of the fleet.



The rapid improvement in driver behaviors noted by FM Conway's Director of Logistics indicates strong user adoption and effective change management capabilities within Samsara's implementation methodology. This suggests that Samsara's technology not only provides the technical capabilities but is also designed for practical implementation and user acceptance. The platform's ability to digitize previously manual processes, such as paper-based vehicle checks, demonstrates Samsara's understanding of workflow optimization beyond simple data collection. This comprehensive approach to fleet management has positioned samsara as a leader in the Connected Operations Platform market, with a strong value proposition for enterprise customers.

In conclusion, the implementation of Samsara's AI-powered solutions at FM Conway has resulted in significant improvements in fleet safety and efficiency. The platform's real-time monitoring and proactive maintenance capabilities have led to substantial cost savings and enhanced operational efficiency. As the transportation sector continues to prioritize safety and efficiency, Samsara's technology offers a competitive edge, positioning the company for further growth and success in the Connected Operations Platform market.

Introducing Manus: The World's First Universal AI Agent - Another Chinese AI Product Splashes
data.description:
Manus, claimed as the world's first universal AI Agent, officially launched a partial internal beta test, marking a crucial step forward in the field of AI autonomous intelligence. It is another Chinese AI product that has made a big splash, following DeepSeek.

According to the introduction, manus is a truly autonomous AI agent. With its powerful capabilities of independent thinking, planning, and executing complex tasks, it can directly deliver complete results, demonstrating unprecedented versatility and execution ability. Just as the name Manus implies, it symbolizes 'hand' in Latin. That is to say, knowledge should not only stay in the mind but also be executable by 'hand'. This is the essential advancement of Agent compared to AI Bot (chatbot) products.

Many users commented on social media that this is yet another sleepless night in the tech circle since DeepSeek made its splash.

To showcase the extensive application capabilities of Manus, the official team has specifically released 40 cases, covering various fields such as personalized travel planning, stock analysis, educational course development, insurance policy comparison, B2B supplier procurement, financial report analysis, company list organization, online store operation analysis, making activity explanatory diagrams, arranging candidate interviews, finding potential customers, and creating teleprompters for press conferences. These cases fully demonstrate the high execution efficiency and practicality of Manus in different scenarios.

In the authoritative gaia benchmark test, Manus has set a new record, far surpassing similar products of OpenAI in performance, further consolidating its leading position in the field of AI autonomous intelligence.

To sum it up in one sentence - what Manus really wants to be is your literal 'agent' in the digital world. And it has achieved that.

'Digital Agent'

Firstly, the biggest difference between Manus and previous Large Language Models (LLMs) in terms of user experience is that it emphasizes the ability to directly deliver the final result, rather than just providing a simple 'answer'.

Manus currently adopts a Multiple Agent architecture and operates in a similar way to the Computer Use released by Anthropic previously, running completely in an independent virtual machine. At the same time, it can call various tools in the virtual environment - writing and executing code, browsing web pages, operating applications, etc., and directly delivering complete results.

In the official released video, three work cases completed by Manus in actual usage scenarios are introduced:

The first task is resume screening.

From 15 resumes, it recommends suitable candidates for the position of reinforcement learning algorithm engineer and ranks the candidates according to their reinforcement learning expertise.

In this demonstration, you don't even need to unzip the compressed file or manually upload each resume file one by one. At this time, Manus has already shown its human-like 'intern' side. It manually unzips the file and browses each resume page by page, while recording the important information in it.

In the result provided by Manus, there is not only an automatically generated ranking suggestion, but it will also divide the candidates into different levels according to important dimensions such as work experience. After receiving the user's preference for presenting the result in the form of an Excel table, Manus can automatically generate the corresponding table by writing a Python script on the spot.

Manus can even use its memory ability to record information like the user prefers to receive the result in the form of a table during this practical process. The next time it processes similar task results, it will preferentially present them in the form of a table.

The second case is property selection.

In the case, the user wants to buy a property in New York and the input requirements are a safe community environment, a low crime rate, and high-quality primary and secondary school education resources - of course, including the most important budget, which should be affordable within the monthly fixed income.

For this requirement, the Manus AI breaks down the complex task into a to-do list, including researching safe communities, identifying high-quality schools, calculating the budget, searching for properties, etc. And through web searches, it carefully reads articles about the safest communities in New York and collects relevant information.

Secondly, Manus writes a Python program to calculate the affordable property budget according to the user's income. Combining with the relevant housing price information on real estate websites, it screens the property list according to the budget range.

Finally, Manus will integrate all the collected information and write a detailed report, including community safety analysis, school quality assessment, budget analysis, recommended property list, and relevant resource links - just like a professional real estate agent. And because Manus has the attribute of 'fully considering the user's interests', its usage experience is even better.

In the last case, Manus demonstrates its ability to analyze stock prices.

The task given in the case is to analyze the correlation between the stock prices of NVIDIA, Marvell Technology, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) over the past three years. As is well known, there is a close correlation among these three stocks, but for novice users, it is difficult to quickly sort out the causal relationship.

The operation of Manus is very similar to that of a real stockbroker. It first accesses information websites such as Yahoo Finance through the API to obtain historical stock data. At the same time, it will also cross-verify the accuracy of the data to avoid being misled by a single information source, which may have a significant impact on the final result.

In this case, Manus also uses its capabilities of writing Python code, conducting data analysis, and visualization. It also introduces professional financial tools for analysis. Finally, through data visualization charts and a detailed comprehensive analysis report, it feedbacks the causal relationship to the user - really just like the daily work done by an 'intern' in the financial field.

Moreover, the official website of Manus also showcases more than a dozen scenarios where Manus can be used: you can directly use Manus to organize your itinerary, get personalized travel route recommendations, and even let it learn to use various complex tools to complete daily work in a streamlined manner.

During this process, what really makes Manus stand out from previous tools is its autonomous planning to ensure the ability to execute tasks.

Behind Manus is Monica.im

In 2024, as soon as GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, and the OpenAI o1 series were launched, Monica enabled users to access the latest State-of-the-Art (SOTA) models. With the new progress in model access, the professional search, DIY Bot, Artifacts for writing mini-programs, memory, and other functions launched by Monica have also been loved by users. And Monica presents different interactive forms and functions on web pages of different functions such as YouTube, Twitter, Gmail, and The Information, to adapt to the user needs of specific scenarios, and has updated the personalized AI experience of hundreds of web pages.

In 2024, the number of Monica users doubled to 10 million. At the same time, it maintained considerable profitability and ranked among the top in similar overseas products.

The R&D team behind Manus is from Monica.im, and its founder, Xiao Hong, is a young serial entrepreneur. Born in 1992, he graduated from Huazhong University of Science and Technology. In 2015, after graduating, he started his own business, and his early entrepreneurship was not very smooth. In 2016, he started a business to provide editing and data analysis tools for WeChat official account operators, which attracted millions of users, achieved profitability, and the product was finally sold to a unicorn company in 2020.

After the wave of large language models in 2022, he officially founded Monica, focusing on the overseas market. Through the product ChatGPT for Google, an independent developer product, the product quickly completed its initial growth.

When interviewed by the media, Xiao Hong said that products should not only exist in the form of chatbots. Agent will be a new form, and new products are needed to undertake it.

He got inspiration from the AI programming products cursor and Devin. An Agent should also, like Devin, be oriented towards the general public and truly be executed under the guidance of AI. However, the problem in the past was that the models were not intelligent enough.

But perhaps encapsulating services for scenarios based on the existing capabilities of the models is exactly the advantage of the Monica team. Xiao Hong said that currently, there are not many Agent product teams because it requires a lot of comprehensive capabilities. For example, the team should have experience in chatbots, AI programming, and browser-related fields (because they all run on browsers), and have a good sense of the boundaries of the models - what level it has developed to today and what level it will develop to in the future, etc.

He believes that the Agent is still in its early stages. Firstly, the Agent is still in the planning stage and has not reached the stage of execution in the physical world. Secondly, the capabilities of large language models are still evolving, and everything is still unpredictable.

data.title: Ethereum's Pectra Upgrade Faces Testnet Hurdles, ETH Holds $2,200 Support
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) has shown resilience in maintaining the crucial $2,200 support level despite recent technical issues related to the Pectra upgrade on the Sepolia Testnet. Developers have successfully addressed these issues, ensuring that the upgrade remains on track for its upcoming mainnet launch.

The Pectra upgrade, designed to introduce significant improvements to the Ethereum network, encountered a glitch in its deposit contract. This led to a faulty execution layer on the Sepolia testnet, prompting the Ethereum development team to work on a fix. The network was subsequently restored to normal operations. tim Beiko, a key figure in the Ethereum development community, reassured users that this issue was specific to Sepolia’s configuration and would not affect the Ethereum mainnet. He confirmed that the developers had resolved the bug and returned Sepolia to normal operations.

This incident marks the second testnet-related challenge for Pectra in a short period. Last week, the upgrade faced finalization issues on the Holesky testnet due to configuration errors within the execution layer clients. Despite these hurdles, developers remain confident that the mainnet upgrade will proceed as planned, although it is uncertain whether the April deployment timeline will be maintained.

The Pectra upgrade is set to bring several enhancements to the Ethereum network, including account abstraction features that enable functionalities like sponsored transactions and gas fee payments with ERC-20 tokens. Additionally, it will improve wallet recovery, bringing security and usability enhancements to Ethereum wallets. The maximum staking cap will also be raised from 32 ETH to 2,048 ETH per node, allowing stakers to pool resources more effectively.

ETH is currently struggling to maintain the $2,200 support level as market sentiment remains cautious following Pectra’s testnet challenges. Recently, Ethereum’s price has faced rejection at the lower boundary of an ascending channel and has been consolidating near $2,200. Analysts argue that if ETH manages to reclaim the lower boundary of this channel, it may attempt to rally toward $2,850, a key resistance level.

Conversely, if bearish momentum starts to pick up speed and ETH closes below $2,200, it may face pressure toward a drop heading into a core support zone at $1,500. Technical indicators offer a

data.title: Skyren DAO Challenges Bitcoin with Active Earnings and Governance
data.description:
Bitcoin has established itself as the premier digital gold, being the first cryptocurrency, the most widely recognized, and the one that institutions view as a legitimate asset. Unlike many altcoins, Bitcoin does not promise complex DeFi mechanics or high-yield staking rewards. Instead, it offers a hedge against inflation and a long-term store of value. This strategy has been effective for over a decade, as institutions entering the crypto market prioritize security, scarcity, and liquidity—all of which Bitcoin provides abundantly.

However, relying solely on being a store of value may not be enough to drive the next market cycle. Bitcoin's price movements are still heavily influenced by macro trends, institutional interest, and ETF flows, rather than actual crypto adoption. The next significant shift in the market might focus more on actively growing wealth rather than just storing it. This is where projects like skyren DAO come into play.

Skyren DAO is not attempting to replicate Bitcoin. It is an ecosystem designed to generate passive income and maximize returns through DeFi mechanics. Unlike Bitcoin, which is often held in cold storage, SKYRN tokens are designed to work for their holders. Three key aspects of the project stand out: automated airdrop collection, staking for passive income, and governance power. SKYRN holders gain access to exclusive, high-value airdrops without needing to hunt for them, the process is automated, ensuring rewards keep flowing. Unlike Bitcoin, which relies on price appreciation alone, Skyren allows users to earn rewards by staking their tokens. Holders aren’t just passive; they actively shape the project’s future through DAO voting, giving them influence over how rewards are structured. This mix of automated earnings, staking rewards, and governance control gives SKYRN an advantage that Bitcoin doesn’t offer, turning holdings into active assets rather than just speculative bets on price appreciation.

The crypto market moves in cycles, and Bitcoin usually leads, with altcoins following. However, each cycle shifts priorities. The 2017 bull run was about ICOs and speculative hype, while the 2021 run focused on Ethereum-based DeFi and NFTs. Now, with DeFi evolving and institutional money looking beyond Bitcoin, the next cycle could reward projects with real utility rather than just scarcity. Skyren DAO fits into this narrative perfectly. DeFi is maturing, and staking, passive rewards, and DAO

data.title: Safe Resumes Operations on Avalanche Blast Unichain Networks
data.description:
Safe, a prominent wallet service, has resumed its operations on several blockchain networks, including Avalanche, Blast, and Unichain. This move is a significant development for users who depend on Safe for secure and efficient transactions across various platforms. The resumption of services on these networks highlights Safe's dedication to providing a seamless and reliable user experience, despite the challenges inherent in the dynamic blockchain ecosystem.

The restoration of support for Avalanche, Blast, and Unichain networks is particularly noteworthy. These platforms are renowned for their high transaction speeds and low fees. Avalanche, for instance, has gained traction for its scalability and interoperability, making it a favored choice for developers and users. Blast is recognized for its innovative approach to decentralized finance (DeFi), offering users a range of financial services without the need for intermediaries. Unichain, on the other hand, is known for its focus on cross-chain interoperability, enabling users to transfer assets seamlessly between different blockchain networks.

Safe's decision to resume operations on these networks is likely driven by the increasing demand for multi-chain support among users. As the blockchain landscape continues to evolve, users are seeking wallets that can support a wide range of networks, allowing them to leverage the unique features and benefits of each platform. By expanding its support to include Avalanche, Blast, and Unichain, Safe is positioning itself as a versatile and forward-thinking wallet service, capable of meeting the diverse needs of its user base.

The resumption of services on these networks also underscores the importance of interoperability in the blockchain ecosystem. As more networks emerge, the ability to seamlessly transfer assets and data between different platforms becomes increasingly crucial. Safe's support for multiple networks not only enhances the user experience but also contributes to the overall growth and development of the blockchain industry. By facilitating cross-chain transactions, Safe is helping to create a more interconnected and efficient ecosystem, where users can easily access a wide range of decentralized applications and services.

In addition to its technical capabilities, Safe's resumption of operations on Avalanche, Blast, and Unichain networks also reflects its commitment to security and reliability. As a wallet service, Safe is responsible for safeguarding users' assets and ensuring that transactions are processed securely and efficiently. By resuming operations on these networks, Safe is demonstrating its ability to adapt to changing circumstances and maintain a high level of service quality. This move is expected to bolster user confidence in Safe

data.title: Bitcoin surges to $92,000 as Trump crypto summit sparks rally
data.description:
Bitcoin has recently experienced a significant surge, jumping to $92,000 and gaining nearly 5% in the past 24 hours. This rally was driven by anticipation surrounding Donald Trump’s crypto summit at the White House. The price of Bitcoin reached a high of $92,760 from a low of $87,500, and has since stabilized around $91,500. This upward movement has also sparked bullish momentum in altcoins, with Solana (SOL), XRP, and Dogecoin (DOGE) showing signs of a rally.

Analysts are closely monitoring the global M2 money supply, which measures financial liquidity, including cash, deposits, and near-money assets. Historically, Bitcoin’s price has moved in sync with M2 expansion, as higher liquidity drives demand for alternative assets like crypto. Since late 2024, global M2 has been rising sharply, leading experts to predict a major Bitcoin rally from late March to mid-May 2025.

Crypto analyst Colin Talks Crypto pointed out a significant rise in global M2, calling it a “vertical line” on the charts—an indicator of a potential surge in asset prices. He expects the rally for Bitcoin, stocks, and the broader crypto market to begin on March 25 and last until May 14.

For example, during the COVID-19 pandemic, the rapid expansion of the M2 money supply coincided with one of Bitcoin’s most significant bull markets. A huge amount of money was pumped into the economy, and at the same time, Bitcoin’s price jumped. People bought Bitcoin to protect their money from losing value due to inflation. On the other hand, when there’s less new money flowing or the money supply grows slowly, Bitcoin’s price can struggle because there’s less cash available for risky investments.

Vandell, co-founder of Black Swan Capitalist, believes that global M2 movements have a direct impact on Bitcoin. He notes that when M2 declines, Bitcoin and the crypto market tend to follow about ten weeks later. Despite possible short-term dips, he sees this cycle setting the stage for long-term growth.

Meanwhile, Michaël van de Poppe, a well-known crypto analyst, sees M2 expansion as a key factor for an early market recovery. He highlights that with inflation slowing,

data.title: Dogecoin Faces Bearish Trend as Rexas Finance Shines in Presale
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) has been struggling to maintain its upward momentum, with bearish indicators suggesting a potential decline. The cryptocurrency is currently trading at $0.26, attempting to hold above the crucial $0.25 support level. Analysts caution that if this level is not sustained, the price could drop further to $0.22, and potentially even reach as low as $0.10 if the downward trend persists.

One of the primary concerns is Dogecoin’s Market Value to Realized Value (MVRV) ratio, which stands at -15.5%. Historically, this level indicates undervaluation and a possible rebound due to increased buying activity. However, the market sentiment is cautious as the 50-day Exponential Moving Average (EMA) is nearing a bearish crossover with the 200-day EMA, known as the “Death Cross.” This technical pattern could signal the end of Dogecoin’s four-month positive trend and the beginning of a prolonged downturn. Additionally, trading volume has been flat, and whale activity has decreased, indicating lower demand at current prices. If Dogecoin fails to convert $0.324 into a support level, analysts believe the bearish momentum will accelerate, further eroding investor confidence.

While Dogecoin faces these challenges, investors have been turning their attention to Rexas Finance (RXS), a cryptocurrency priced at $0.20 with strong fundamentals and real-world applications. The Rexas Finance presale has been highly successful, raising $46.2 million across 12 stages and selling 450 million tokens. In the final stage, 90% of the tokens have been sold, with the current price representing a 6x increase from its initial cost of $0.03. Rexas Finance is pioneering real-world asset tokenization, a sector estimated to grow from $50 billion to $16 trillion by 2030. This technology allows users to tokenize real estate, art, and commodities for fractional ownership and liquidity, enabling investors to buy a fraction of high-value assets for as little as $100.

The Rexas Finance ecosystem focuses on innovation, offering tools like the Rexas Token Builder for easy development of real-world asset-backed tokens, and the Rexas QuickMint Bot for deploying tokens on social apps without technical skills.
